name: Chrome Dino Game Auto-Player
description: Plays the Chrome T-Rex dinosaur runner game by hooking into the game's update loop to detect obstacles and trigger jumps. The bot patches Runner.instance_.update to react every frame with perfect timing. Auto-restarts on crash.

step.description: Wait for page to fully load
Start the game and install the auto-play bot into the game loop
step.code: window.__jumpCount = 0; window.__bestScore = 0; var r = Runner.instance_; var origUpdate = r.update; r.update = function(dt, on) { var result = origUpdate.call(this, dt, on); try { var active = this.playing || this.activated; if (active && !this.crashed && this.horizon) { var obs = this.horizon.obstacles; if (obs && obs.length > 0) { var ob = obs[0]; var tRex = this.tRex; var speed = this.currentSpeed || 6; var obRight = ob.xPos + (ob.width || 25); var dist = ob.xPos - tRex.xPos - 44; var safeEnd = obRight - tRex.xPos; if (dist < 250 && safeEnd > -10) { var isPterodactyl = ob.typeConfig && ob.typeConfig.type === 'PTERODACTYL'; if (isPterodactyl && ob.yPos < 75) { if (!tRex.ducking) tRex.setDuck(true); } else if (!tRex.jumping && !tRex.ducking) { tRex.startJump(speed); window.__jumpCount++; } } if (tRex.ducking && safeEnd < -20) { tRex.setDuck(false); } } } if (this.crashed) { var score = parseInt(this.distanceMeter.digits.join('')) || 0; if (score > window.__bestScore) window.__bestScore = score; this.restart(); } } catch(e) {} return result; }; r.playIntro(); r.startGame(); return 'Game started with auto-play bot';

step.description: Let the bot play for 3 seconds
Read current score and game state
step.code: try { var r = Runner.instance_; if (r && r.distanceMeter) { var score = r.distanceMeter.digits.join(''); var speed = (r.currentSpeed || 0).toFixed(1); var crashed = r.crashed || false; return JSON.stringify({score: score, speed: speed, crashed: crashed, jumps: window.__jumpCount, bestScore: window.__bestScore}); } } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({error: e.message}); } return JSON.stringify({score: '0', speed: '0', crashed: false});

step.description: Stop the bot and get final score
step.code: var r = Runner.instance_; r.update = Runner.prototype.update; try { if (r && r.distanceMeter) return 'Final score: ' + r.distanceMeter.digits.join('') + ' | Best: ' + window.__bestScore + ' | Total jumps: ' + window.__jumpCount; } catch(e) {} return 'Bot stopped';
